source:
import Link from "next/link"; import { ArrowLeft, AlertCircle, RefreshCw, FileText } from "lucide-react"; import { MarketingHeader } from "@/components/layout/marketing-header"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; export const metadata = { title: "Solve uFiling Errors: Employee Not Declared & Upload Issues | LekkerLedger", description: "Struggling with the uFiling portal? Learn how to bypass common errors by uploading a perfectly formatted CSV declaration generated by LekkerLedger.", }; export default function UFilingErrorsPage() { return (
{/* HERO SECTION */}

Common uFiling Errors (And How to Bypass Them)

The official uFiling portal is notorious for timeouts, "Employee not declared" errors, and manual entry failures. Stop typing manually and switch to CSV uploads.

The problem with manual entry

Most household employers log into uFiling and attempt to manually capture their domestic worker's hours and salary on the "Declarations" screen. This method frequently results in the following frustations:

Error 404 / 500

The session times out before you finish typing, forcing you to start over.

"Employee Missing"

You manually type the ID number, but the system says they are not registered to your profile.

Decimal Formatting

Entering a comma instead of a dot (or vice versa) triggers an invalid amount error.

Slow Loading

Clicking through four different screens just to declare one employee takes too long.

The Recommended Solution: CSV Uploads

Experienced payroll administrators never use the manual entry screens. They use the "Upload Payroll File" feature. This allows you to upload a simple spreadsheet (CSV mapped to exactly what uFiling expects), bypassing the slow manual forms entirely.

The LekkerLedger Workflow

  • 1

    You generate your monthly payslip in LekkerLedger as usual.

  • 2

    At the end of the month, click "Download uFiling Export" in your Pro dashboard.

  • 3

    Log into uFiling, go to Returns, select Upload File, and select the CSV you just downloaded.

  • 4

    Done. The system instantly accepts the perfectly formatted data without timeouts.

Ready to stop fighting uFiling?

The CSV export feature is available to all LekkerLedger Pro users. It maps perfectly to the Department's technical specifications.

); }
